name: Three Alarm Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 No. 10 can canned kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine beef and onions in a stockpot over a moderate flame.
2 Heat and stir for 15-20 minutes until browned.
3 Stir in the remaining ingredients.
4 Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 2 hours.
5 Serve hot, garnished with grated cheddar cheese, sour cream, and minced sweet onion.
